definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">player_ticks</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_entity_compare"><field name="entity">EntityPlayer</field><value name="compareTo"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">if (entity instanceof Player player) {&#10;    boolean isCrawling = player.getPersistentData().getBoolean("ssc14_is_crawling").orElse(false);&#10;    &#10;    &#10;    if (isCrawling) {&#10;        // В режиме ползания — устанавливаем позу&#10;        if (player.getPose() != Pose.SWIMMING) {&#10;            player.setPose(Pose.SWIMMING);&#10;            player.refreshDimensions();&#10;            System.out.println("[CRAWL] Set to SWIMMING");&#10;        }&#10;    } else {&#10;        // Проверяем, можно ли встать — точная коллизия с хитбоксом&#10;        AABB standingBox = player.getDimensions(Pose.STANDING)&#10;                                .makeBoundingBox(player.getX(), player.getY(), player.getZ());&#10;        &#10;        boolean canStand = player.level().noCollision(player, standingBox);&#10;        &#10;        if (canStand && player.getPose() == Pose.SWIMMING) {&#10;            player.setPose(Pose.STANDING);&#10;            player.refreshDimensions();&#10;            &#10;        } else if (!canStand) {&#10;            &#10;            // ВАЖНО: НЕ включаем ползание автоматически!&#10;            // Просто остаёмся в текущей позе&#10;        }&#10;    }&#10;}</field></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
